image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Beyond Neptune lies a hidden treasure—the Kuiper Belt.
Context visual: This icy region is home to Pluto and countless other remnants from our solar system's formation.
Escalation visual: Imagine floating in a vast expanse where icy bodies collide and create new worlds.
Evidence visual: Scientists believe the Kuiper Belt could hold clues about the early solar system.
Payoff visual: These remnants might even reveal secrets about planets yet to be discovered!
Cta visual: Curious to learn more? Hit that follow and dive deeper into space with us!
